channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.nintendolife.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.nintendolife.com

item.title: Watch: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Direct March 2026 - Live!
item.content:encoded:
Let's-a go!

It feels like it has been a non-stop stream of showcases for weeks now, and today, Nintendo has yet another one for us.

Yes, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is being treated to another Direct of its own in just a few minutes. The one of these that we got back in January amounted to little more than a trailer drop (with some banter from Miyamoto-san and Chris-san, of course), and we imagine that today's will be more of the same.

With less than a month to go before the film launches in cinemas, we're assuming that this might be the final proper trailer before the big day, so if Nintendo and Illumination have any last-minute surprises to get audiences excited, this'll be the place to show it.

Here's the exact time that the Direct gets underway in your region:

  • North America: 2pm PDT / 3pm MDT / 4pm CDT / 5pm EDT
  • UK/Ire: 9pm GMT
  • Europe: 10pm CET / 11pm EET
  • Asia/Oceania: 6am (Tue) JST / 5am (Tue) AWST / 8am (Tue) AEDT

As ever, the full Direct will be livestreamed on the Nintendo of America YouTube channel (or your regional variant), but you can also watch along via the stream below and have a natter with your fellow Nintendo Lifers while you do it.

Get your trailer bingo cards at the ready, because the show's about to begin.



https://www.nintendolife.com/news/2026/03/watch-the-super-mario-galaxy-movie-direct-march-2026-live
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
